feed.description: Photography conversations: craft, storytelling, workflow, and making images under real constraints.
feed.title: Frame & Light

bullets: Welcome back to Frame & Light. Today we're talking about roundtable photography, and I'm joined by Ava Lemoine, underwater photographer. Ava Lemoine, thanks for being here.
Before we get into it — Ava walked us through underwater work last month, Tariq covered documentary, Daniel on commercial lighting — today we get all three in the same conversation.
Yeah, exactly. And it ties into what we're covering today.
summary.raw_text: Welcome back to Frame & Light. Today we're talking about roundtable photography, and I'm joined by Ava Lemoine, underwater photographer. Ava Lemoine, thanks for being here.
summary.title: Roundtable: Three Photographers on Light
